# Modbus Function 4 Response for Device 2 (Escalator)
# Registers starting at 30001, 38 registers (30001-30038)
# 30001=Condition, 30002=Mode, 30003=Gotov, 30004=BlockCircute, 30005=BremseCondition, 30006=BU1-BU3, 30007-30008=messages, 30009-30027=params/signals, 30028-30030=reserved, 30031-30038=message buffer
